reviews.review_description: Devs im begging for u guys to bring this fun game back this was my first ever game i had when i got a vr for christmas i made my first vr friends on this game, the community was awesome aswell, please devs i hope u guys bring this game back

Echo VR wasn’t just a game because it felt like a place you could escape to. The zero gravity movement, the quick passes, the random voices of teammates.. it all felt real in a way most games don’t.

What makes it hurt is how it was suddenly just gone. No more drifting through arenas, no more running into the same players, no more moments you didn’t plan but ended up remembering anyway.
Now it’s just memories.. and your last match didn’t feel like an ending, just another “see you next time” that never got to happen. 

I still catch myself wishing, even for a second, that i could log back in and find it all exactly where it was left.
To everyone who still has echo.. like this review.

This wasn’t just a game, this was a memory. This was the first VR game I ever owned since it was free. This let me make friends and have some of the most fun I’ve ever had in VR. No amount of skill can ever recreate something this good.

it was very very fun the best game before it got shut down then i moved on to rec room very very fun then it got shut down we need a game that you can be social have fun and make lots of friends VRChat is close but not quiet same with Roblox both very fun just have mistakes and bad game ending ideas but back to echo everyone had fun in it hex vr isn't as satisfying or quiet like echo nothing was like echo it was a one of a kind but you know what they say all good things must come to an end.

reviews.review_title: BRING IT BACK! My message to the devs
reviews.review_description: I know you guys have other games to work on but please the community LOVES this game! so im begging you guys to bring this back this game helps with trust and teamork! i cant find ANY other game that the people are ACTUALLY nice and resepctful! so im gonna say it again PLEASE BRING IT BACK AND WE PROMISE TO DO GOOD WITH THIS GAME!

Echo vr was a huge part of my life for gaming and for growing up, the community was amazing and sure there were some mean people every once and a bit but that mute all button and block button were there for a reason. It sucks how ready at dawn had to abandon this game I miss it so much and many of us do even now you can play it through discord but it’s like a game frozen in time we miss the updates knowing you could level up and gain rewards. You guys said upcoming projects but I haven’t heard of anything. Please come back some how

It is vary sad that this game was gone  idk if it’s back yet but it’s very good and I tryed to play this game for hours straight and then after 2min 1sec my head set died and I was sad when I heard it was gone.

I rember being fresh to the quest and this was the first game I owned It allowed me to reconnect with friends that I had played sports with through school and had moved away the developers should be ashamed of themselfs for making such a great loved game and discontinuing it they at the very least could have sold it off to another developer as to not piss off the mass of people who played this game religiously. They also missed an incredible opportunity to begin expanding esports into the VR space. Please bring this game back or make it open source and allow people to inject their passion into running the game if you won’t
No other platform can give the same experince as this game in VR and it was phenominal. Hopefully one day in some form it will return.
One of the best vr games EVER hands UP DOWN LEFT AND RIGHT
Echo vr was the first vr game I ever played it has so many memories from when I was young RIP echo vr
ghk
Idk how long its been but I hope that they will make another one 🥹

I wrote a review when the server shut down that I’d never support meta until this came back. To think it was to focus on the already failed metaverse is a sad tale of not listening to your customers. I owned a rift, quest 1, and stopped at quest 2. Won’t get another until I hear this is back. It could have brought so many more
People to your headsets, and would have been a flagship app with such a large player base as the 2 rolled out. A huge miss by your failed
Leadership team.

reviews.review_description: Echo VR was my childhood any time I hade a rough rough￼ day at school I’d get on my quest and play Echo VR but now that is shut down all you did meta is Mack me sad, depress and angry Echo VR was the greatest VR game and you shut it down. I miss Echo VR meta so pls bring back Echo VR maby you can do it on February 5th that’s the day on my birthday so pls meta pls bring back my Childhood game Echo VR🥺
2 good vr games shut down first this now rec room rip.

If ur a fan of this game please go check out hex vr i found it recently it’s the exact same game same maps and everything i just dont know if theres a hang out area right now cus its in beta but seriously definitely worth checking out n i need people to play with

You see everybody asking for it to come back. We understand that you have other games to focus on but it’s sad that people like my little brother will never get to experience this because he just got his oculus. Bring back echo. We all love it and miss it and it was most of our child hoods. We need a game like this back, I used to come home from school and play until I didn’t. We all want this back and we all need this back. Please devs, give us echo back.

This was a big part of my childhood ever since i saw this game was no longer running i quit vr for like 2 years and now I'm back still waiting till i can play echo again echo was one of my first ever games i played thank for making such a great game but we want to play again, echo was a game were you made friends,crash out on people, mess around and laugh pls bring the game back,thank you

When I first got this game I thought it wasn't going to be fun but it proved me wrong when I asked how to get things in the game the people were helping me and even giving me tips on how to play. It really sucks we can't play it anymore but the fun memories I had playing with random was the most fun I have ever had on vr. 5 star game.

This game was the best game that ever released on oculus it was simple but fun you could play it for hours on end and just not get bored I remember not knowing it was going down and I was playing my last Match and I heard this guy getting emotional and I asked him what was up and this guy was about near 16 at the time and said that the game was going down and him being emotional saying that at 16 years of age means that this game wasn’t a bad game it was the peakest game of all time and I’m really disappointed for all the new people who have got a vr that never got to experience this masterpiece please oculus (meta) if you see this please bring it back and I get that it’s been years since its deletion and you might not have the games files but please bring it back this game was never dying  just oculus killed it Imiss echo vr… ￼
I’m used to play this game everyday and I also played until all servers shut down best game on vr NO ￼GAME IS LIKE ECHO

Please bring it back it was such a fun game and I remember I got my oculus quest 2 about 2 years ago and it helped me learn and teach me about the community also it was really fun

reviews.review_title: The game that would keep you mourning.
reviews.review_description: After so long, I have finally decided to write a review. I loved all of the sneaky plushie easter eggs in the customization room. I used to glitch out of the map in the one tube. I loved during the last moments of the game, we could get everything. When the day finally came for it to say farewell, I decided to play one last game. In it, I scored the last goal, and by the time the game was over, I got kicked. It was at that moment, that I said my final goodbye.
This game is the best game I’ve ever played on vr pls bring it back
So far I’ve had a vr headset for many years and not one game has ever been as fun as this one I would pay hundreds just to play again. This was and will always be my favorite game in vr.
This game was the peak of vr gaming, fun doesn't get boring and challenging. It is a game many miss so please let it return.
This game was so fun I used to just float around the lobby having the time of my life please bring it back I only have 90 years to live
Yes it is😌

The game was the only game I could play where I would enjoy myself on vr it was fun and amazing. I loved it and I was BROKEN when the servers shut down I felt like crying (I did) Pls turn echo back on.
It was the first game that I actually liked. Bring it back. ￼

Even if I was awful at the game, I can't help but dream about the good ol' days where I'd be in an arena effectively playing 0 gravity frisbee, but id  be lying if I said it was boring. Echo had to be one of the greatest things ever to caress the gaming scene. To remove echo vr is to commit murder on fun. 

BRING IT BACK
i got on my headset excited to play but i loaded in and saw that i couldn’t play it anymore. ever since that day vr hasn’t been that fun anymore. please just bring it back
Literally Prime VR

This was one of my 1st games on my meta quest 2. And that is how I found the love for vr. I wish I played this way more than any other game. I don’t see the reason for servers to be shutdown forever. Please bring the back, everyone wants it back

It's been a great couple of years playing this game. I love this game and the community from annoying squeakers to people blasting music making my ears bleed, to anyone else. Sad this game has to go, but I wanted to write a goodbye before it's gone. Thanks for everything.
Please BEING THE GAME BACK I USED TO ALLLLLL WAYSSSS PLAYYY THISSSSS

There was legitimately no reason to bring this game down, not only did it have one of the larger vr player bases but was also a staple of vr as a platform. It’s a fan favourited game with a passionate community of people and was one of the games I’d personally think of first when talking about vr. It’s scummy towards the fans who either dedicated lots to the game or consumers who have spent money on the game,for example,I remember losing my ability to play pc vr and was waiting for when the combat mode I paid for would get added to the native quest version so I could actually play it. So I never got to play the combat mode and any money that went on the game was effectively burnt, I feel that if meta can spend millions supporting horizon worlds,a platform that no one I know uses except to take a jab on the ai generated games on there, then surely meta couldve certainly supported echo vr
The only reason i bought another headset was for Echo. I was going to buy another so my son and I could play together. What a mistake

i remember when vr was actually fun just look back at videos from 7-8 years ago when vr was a new exciting thing and everyone thought it would only get better until oculus was bought and the focus was shifted from gaming to work which frankly i dont think anyone wanted. All triple A games like saints and sinners stand alone now as meta dont seem intereted in helping make them and then the one of if not the only game that managed to stay revelant from the old oculus rift days was closed to focus on a metaverse that no one wanted and that shows. The only game that deserves a 5 star review was destroyed and now no new players get to experience this materpiece of Gaming. Literally my childhood it deserves to be back.

reviews.review_title: Got it back using Echo VR Lounge!!!
reviews.review_description:
After 2 years (ish) of missing the game I have finally gotten it back thanks to Echo VR Lounge.
So happy for myself and others who have managed to get the game back! If you don’t know how to get the game back, watch a tutorial which mentions Echo VR Lounge!
